emptyState.title: No buckets found
emptyState.description: Create your first bucket to get started.

rules.title: Bucket naming rules:
rules.length: Bucket names must be between 3 and 63 characters long
rules.characters: Bucket names can consist only of lowercase letters, numbers, dots (.), and hyphens (-)
rules.startEnd: Bucket names must begin and end with a letter or number
rules.noPeriods: Bucket names must not contain two adjacent periods
rules.noIp: Bucket names must not be formatted as an IP address (for example, 192.168.5.4)
rules.unique: Bucket names must be unique within the current configuration

refresh.successMessage: Storage locations have been updated successfully.

validation.invalidNameMessage: Bucket name {{bucketName}} is invalid. Please check the rules and try again.

notifications.title: Bucket Notifications
notifications.description: Configure webhook notifications for events in this bucket.

emptyState.title: No notifications configured
emptyState.description: Add a notification to receive webhook events when objects are created or deleted in this bucket.

form.endpointHelperText: HTTP or HTTPS URL that will receive event notifications

deleteConfirm.title: Remove notification?
deleteConfirm.message: This will stop sending events to this endpoint.

success.createdMessage: Notification configuration has been updated successfully.

error.endpointInvalid: Endpoint must start with http:// or https://
error.eventsRequired: At least one event type must be selected
